tasks.title: Define Domain Entities and TypeScript Interfaces
tasks.description: Create comprehensive TypeScript interfaces for all domain entities including Folder, DashboardShare, ShareLink, DashboardComment, Notification, and enhanced Dashboard with lifecycle fields
tasks.details: Create `types/workspace.ts` with interfaces: Folder (id, name, parentId, userId, createdAt), Dashboard (enhanced with lifecycleStatus, creator, contributors, creationDate, lastChangeAt, lastChangeBy, folderId, thumbnailUrl), DashboardShare (dashboardId, sharedWith, permission, sharedBy, sharedAt, message, notifyOnFirstView), ShareLink (dashboardId, token, permission, createdBy, createdAt, isActive), DashboardComment (id, dashboardId, authorId, content, createdAt), Notification (id, type, userId, dashboardId, fromUserId, message, createdAt, isRead). Include enums for LifecycleStatus ('created' | 'published'), Permission ('view' | 'comment' | 'edit'), NotificationType.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit tests for type validation, interface completeness checks, and enum value constraints. Verify all required fields are present and optional fields are properly typed.

tasks.title: Implement Mock Identity and User Directory System
tasks.description: Create mock user identity system with localStorage persistence and organization user directory for sharing functionality
tasks.details: Create `lib/mock-auth.ts` with mock User interface (id, name, email, avatar), currentUser Zustand slice with localStorage persistence, and mock organization directory of 8+ users. Implement user-switcher debug component in `components/debug/user-switcher.tsx` with dropdown to change current user. Store current user ID in localStorage key 'spm-current-user-id'.
tasks.testStrategy: Test user switching persists across reloads, mock directory contains diverse users, and user-switcher component renders correctly. Verify localStorage integration works properly.

tasks.title: Create Workspace Zustand Store with localStorage Persistence
tasks.description: Implement comprehensive Zustand store for workspace state management with localStorage persistence layer
tasks.details: Create `stores/workspace-store.ts` with slices for: folders (CRUD operations), dashboards (with lifecycle management), shares, shareLinks, comments, notifications, filters (equipment, status, creator, contributor, dateRange), sort options, selection state, recent dashboards list (LRU, max 20), and trash. Implement localStorage persistence middleware using Zustand persist. Include actions for all CRUD operations and state management.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit tests for all store actions, localStorage persistence verification, state isolation between users, and proper state hydration on app load. Test filter and sort state persistence.

tasks.title: Implement Workspace Data Seeding System
tasks.description: Replace existing workspace data with deterministic seeding system that generates realistic folder structures, dashboards, shares, and notifications
tasks.details: Create `lib/workspace-seed.ts` with deterministic seeding functions that generate: nested folder structures (5+ levels deep), 50+ mock dashboards across multiple equipment types with varied lifecycle states, sample shares between users, realistic comments, and notification history. Implement 'Reset Workspace' debug action that clears localStorage and reseeds data. Ensure data is consistent and realistic for testing.
tasks.testStrategy: Verify seeded data covers all edge cases, folder nesting works correctly, dashboard distribution across equipment is realistic, and reset functionality works properly. Test with different user identities.

tasks.title: Set Up App Router Pages Structure
tasks.description: Create Next.js App Router pages for all workspace and dashboard routes
tasks.details: Create App Router pages: `app/workspace/page.tsx` (main workspace view), `app/workspace/folder/[folderId]/page.tsx` (folder view), `app/workspace/shared/page.tsx` (shared with me), `app/workspace/dashboard/[dashboardId]/edit/page.tsx` (workspace editor), `app/dashboards/[dashboardId]/full/page.tsx` (full-screen viewer), `app/share/[linkToken]/page.tsx` (share link landing). Each page should have proper TypeScript typing and basic layout structure.
tasks.testStrategy: Test all routes render correctly, dynamic segments work properly, and navigation between routes functions. Verify TypeScript compilation passes for all pages.

tasks.title: Build Workspace Shell UI Layout
tasks.description: Create the main workspace layout with top bar, left sidebar folder tree, main content area, and breadcrumb navigation
tasks.details: Create `components/views/workspace/workspace-shell.tsx` with responsive layout using existing two-layer sidebar architecture. Include top bar with search, view toggle (grid/list), and user actions. Left sidebar contains folder tree and virtual locations. Main area shows dashboard grid/list. Implement breadcrumb navigation component. Use shadcn/ui components and Tailwind v4 utilities for consistency.
tasks.testStrategy: Test responsive behavior across viewport sizes, sidebar collapse/expand functionality, and proper integration with existing app shell. Verify accessibility with keyboard navigation.

tasks.title: Implement Folder Tree Component with Drag-and-Drop
tasks.description: Build nested folder tree with drag-and-drop functionality, context menus, and virtual locations
tasks.details: Create `components/workspace/folder-tree.tsx` using react-dnd or native HTML5 drag-and-drop. Support nested rendering up to 5+ levels, drag-and-drop for moving folders and dashboards, context menus for folder operations (create, rename, delete, move). Include virtual locations: 'All Dashboards', 'Shared with me', 'Recent', 'Trash'. Implement ARIA tree role for accessibility.
tasks.testStrategy: Test drag-and-drop across different nesting levels, context menu actions, keyboard navigation with arrow keys, and screen reader compatibility. Verify virtual locations filter correctly.

tasks.title: Create Dashboard Card Component
tasks.description: Build dashboard card component for grid and list views with hover actions, status indicators, and metadata display
tasks.details: Create `components/workspace/dashboard-card.tsx` with responsive card design showing thumbnail, title, equipment, creator, contributors (avatars), last modified date, lifecycle status badge, and permission level (for shared dashboards). Include hover actions: open popup, share, duplicate, move, delete. Support both grid and list view layouts. Use existing shadcn/ui card components.
tasks.testStrategy: Test card rendering in both grid and list views, hover state interactions, status badge accuracy, and contributor avatar display. Verify responsive behavior and accessibility.

tasks.title: Implement Search, Filter, and Sort Functionality
tasks.description: Build comprehensive search, filtering, and sorting system with debounced input and persistent state
tasks.details: Create `components/workspace/search-filter-bar.tsx` with debounced search input (300ms), filter chips for equipment/status/creator/contributor/date range, and sort dropdown. Implement `hooks/use-workspace-filters.ts` for state management. Search should cover dashboard name, equipment name, creator name, folder name. Filters should be removable chips. State persists in Zustand store across navigation.
tasks.testStrategy: Test search debouncing, filter combinations, sort options, chip removal, and state persistence. Verify search covers all specified fields and filtering works correctly with large datasets.

tasks.title: Build Dashboard Popup Viewer for Workspace
tasks.description: Create workspace-specific dashboard popup with full-screen toggle, comments panel, edit button, and open-in-new-tab functionality
tasks.details: Create `components/workspace/dashboard-popup.tsx` as dialog overlay rendering dashboard widget grid. Include action buttons: full-screen toggle, comments panel toggle, edit (permission-aware), and 'Open in new tab'. Reuse existing widget grid rendering logic. Handle permission-based action enabling/disabling. Implement popup close on new tab open.
tasks.testStrategy: Test popup rendering, action button functionality, permission-based UI states, full-screen mode, and new tab opening behavior. Verify widget grid renders correctly within popup.

tasks.title: Implement Comments Panel Component
tasks.description: Build comments side panel with chronological comment list and composer for users with comment permissions
tasks.details: Create `components/workspace/comments-panel.tsx` with scrollable comment list showing author, timestamp, and content. Include comment composer (textarea + submit) enabled only for users with comment permission. Comments stored in Zustand keyed by dashboard ID. Support real-time updates within same session. Use existing shadcn/ui components for consistency.
tasks.testStrategy: Test comment posting, chronological ordering, permission-based composer enabling, and real-time updates. Verify comment persistence and proper author attribution.

tasks.title: Create Workspace-Native Dashboard Editor
tasks.description: Build new dashboard editor component that reuses Widget Library without modifying legacy editor
tasks.details: Create `components/views/workspace/dashboard-editor.tsx` as completely new editor (not importing legacy editor). Reuse existing Widget Library catalog and drag-and-drop functionality. Support widget grid manipulation: add from library, reposition, resize, delete. Include save/exit actions. Update contributor list on save by non-creator. Use react-grid-layout for grid management.
tasks.testStrategy: Test widget library integration, drag-and-drop functionality, grid manipulation, save behavior, and contributor tracking. Verify no interference with legacy editor and proper Widget Library reuse.

tasks.title: Build Share Dialog with Named User Sharing
tasks.description: Create comprehensive share dialog supporting multiple recipients, permission levels, messages, and first-view notifications
tasks.details: Create `components/workspace/share-dialog.tsx` with tabs for 'Share with users' and 'Get link'. User sharing tab includes: typeahead user picker from mock directory, permission selector (view/comment/edit), optional message field (500 char limit), 'notify on first view' checkbox, and current shares list with permission editing. Implement user search/filtering in typeahead.
tasks.testStrategy: Test user typeahead functionality, permission selection, message validation, notification preferences, and current shares management. Verify proper user directory integration.

tasks.title: Implement Share Link Generation and Management
tasks.description: Build share link functionality with unique token generation, permission control, and revocation capabilities
tasks.details: Create share link tab in share dialog with unique token generation (crypto.randomUUID()), permission selector, copy button with clipboard API, and revoke/regenerate controls. Implement `lib/share-links.ts` for token management. Store share links in Zustand with dashboard association. Include link validation and expiration handling.
tasks.testStrategy: Test link generation uniqueness, clipboard copying, permission application, revocation functionality, and token validation. Verify links work correctly when accessed.

tasks.title: Create Share Link Landing Page
tasks.description: Build share link landing route with identity picker and permission application
tasks.details: Implement `app/share/[linkToken]/page.tsx` that validates share link token, shows dashboard preview, and handles user identity. For signed-in users, apply link permission automatically. For unsigned users, show mock identity picker (reuse user-switcher logic). After identity selection, redirect to workspace with dashboard popup open. Handle invalid/revoked links with appropriate error states.
tasks.testStrategy: Test link validation, identity picker functionality, permission application, error handling for invalid links, and proper redirection flow. Verify integration with mock auth system.

tasks.title: Build Shared With Me Virtual Location
tasks.description: Implement 'Shared with me' view showing dashboards shared with current user and request access functionality
tasks.details: Create shared dashboards view in `components/workspace/shared-with-me.tsx` showing dashboards shared with current user. Display sharer name, permission level, shared date, and dashboard metadata. Include 'Request access' button for dashboards where user lacks comment/edit permission. Generate permission request notifications for dashboard owners.
tasks.testStrategy: Test shared dashboard display, metadata accuracy, request access functionality, and notification generation. Verify proper filtering to show only dashboards shared with current user.

tasks.title: Implement Comms Module Alerts Page
tasks.description: Create alerts page in Comms module listing all dashboard-related notifications with deep-linking
tasks.details: Create `components/views/comms/alerts-page.tsx` showing notification list in reverse chronological order. Display category icon, primary text, secondary text (message excerpt), timestamp, read/unread state, and 'View' action button. Support notification types: dashboard_shared_with_you, dashboard_first_view, permission_request_received, permission_request_resolved. Implement deep-linking to workspace with dashboard focus.
tasks.testStrategy: Test notification display, chronological ordering, read/unread states, deep-linking functionality, and proper categorization. Verify all notification types render correctly.

tasks.title: Add Unread Badge to Comms Module Rail
tasks.description: Implement live unread notification count badge on Comms module rail icon
tasks.details: Update Comms module rail entry to show unread notification count badge. Create `hooks/use-unread-notifications.ts` that subscribes to workspace store notifications and calculates unread count. Badge should update in real-time when notifications are added or marked as read. Use existing badge component styling for consistency.
tasks.testStrategy: Test real-time badge updates, accurate unread counting, badge visibility states (show/hide based on count), and proper integration with existing rail styling.

tasks.title: Update Equipment Home Page Edit Dashboards Integration
tasks.description: Modify Equipment Home Page to navigate to Workspace with equipment pre-filtering when Edit Dashboards is clicked
tasks.details: Update 'Edit Dashboards' button in Equipment Home Page to navigate to `/workspace` with equipment pre-filter applied. Add `preFilterEquipmentId` and `workspaceInitialEquipmentId` to Zustand store. Implement navigation with equipment context preservation. Update existing Equipment Home Page component without breaking current functionality.
tasks.testStrategy: Test navigation from Equipment Home Page to Workspace, equipment filter application, context preservation, and backward compatibility with existing Equipment Home Page functionality.

tasks.title: Add Open in New Tab to Equipment Home Page Dashboard Popup
tasks.description: Enhance Equipment Home Page dashboard popup with 'Open in new tab' functionality
tasks.details: Add 'Open in new tab' button to existing Equipment Home Page dashboard popup. Button should open `/dashboards/[dashboardId]/full` in new tab and close popup in originating tab. Implement proper tab management and ensure new tab opens with full-screen dashboard view. Maintain existing popup functionality.
tasks.testStrategy: Test new tab opening, popup closure in originating tab, full-screen dashboard rendering in new tab, and preservation of existing popup functionality.

tasks.title: Implement Cross-Tab Signaling Utility
tasks.description: Build cross-tab communication system using BroadcastChannel with localStorage fallback for dashboard open state tracking
tasks.details: Create `lib/cross-tab-signaling.ts` with BroadcastChannel wrapper and localStorage event fallback. Implement `useDashboardOpenTabs(dashboardId)` hook that tracks dashboard open state across tabs. Handle tab open/close events with proper cleanup on page unload. Support multiple tabs opening same dashboard simultaneously with accurate count tracking.
tasks.testStrategy: Test BroadcastChannel functionality, localStorage fallback, accurate tab counting, proper cleanup on tab close, and cross-browser compatibility. Verify multiple simultaneous tabs work correctly.

tasks.title: Create Full-Screen Dashboard Viewer Route
tasks.description: Build chromeless full-screen dashboard viewer for new tab viewing
tasks.details: Implement `app/dashboards/[dashboardId]/full/page.tsx` with chromeless layout (no sidebar, header, or navigation). Render dashboard widget grid in read-only mode using existing widget components. Implement cross-tab signaling handshake on mount and cleanup on unmount. Handle dashboard not found and permission errors appropriately.
tasks.testStrategy: Test chromeless rendering, read-only widget grid functionality, cross-tab signaling integration, error handling, and proper cleanup on tab close. Verify no editing capabilities are available.

tasks.title: Add Open Elsewhere Indicator to Equipment Home Page
tasks.description: Implement real-time indicator on Equipment Home Page dashboard cards showing when dashboard is open in other tabs
tasks.details: Add 'open elsewhere' indicator to Equipment Home Page dashboard cards/tabs using cross-tab signaling. Show indicator when dashboard is open in any other browser tab with count display. Update indicator in real-time as tabs open/close. Use existing UI patterns for indicator styling and positioning.
tasks.testStrategy: Test real-time indicator updates, accurate count display, proper show/hide behavior, and visual integration with existing dashboard cards. Verify indicator works across multiple tabs.

tasks.title: Clean Up Workspace Module Rail Submenu
tasks.description: Replace current workspace rail submenu with clean, professional entries as specified in requirements
tasks.details: Update workspace module rail submenu to show only: 'All Dashboards', 'Shared with me', 'Recent', 'Trash'. Remove existing 'Favorite' and duplicate 'Share with me' entries. Ensure single-level menu structure with no nested submenus. Update navigation logic to work with new menu structure.
tasks.testStrategy: Test new menu structure, navigation functionality, removal of old entries, and proper integration with workspace views. Verify no nested submenu levels exist.

tasks.title: Implement Dashboard CRUD Operations
tasks.description: Build comprehensive dashboard creation, duplication, moving, renaming, and deletion functionality
tasks.details: Implement dashboard CRUD operations: create new dashboard with equipment selection and name validation, duplicate dashboard with 'Copy of' prefix, move dashboard between folders via drag-and-drop or context menu, inline rename with validation, delete with confirmation dialog. Update Zustand store and handle all business rules and constraints.
tasks.testStrategy: Test all CRUD operations, validation rules, confirmation dialogs, drag-and-drop moving, inline editing, and proper state updates. Verify business rule enforcement and error handling.

tasks.title: Implement Dashboard Publishing and Lifecycle Management
tasks.description: Build dashboard publishing system with lifecycle state transitions and audit logging
tasks.details: Implement publish/unpublish functionality for dashboards. Add lifecycle status management (created/published) with proper state transitions. Create audit logging for lifecycle changes in ChangeLogEntry format. Handle Equipment Home Page visibility updates when dashboards are published/unpublished. Ensure published dashboards remain editable in workspace.
tasks.testStrategy: Test publish/unpublish transitions, audit log creation, Equipment Home Page visibility updates, and continued editability of published dashboards. Verify proper lifecycle state management.

tasks.title: Implement Recent and Trash Virtual Locations
tasks.description: Build Recent dashboards list and Trash functionality with soft deletion
tasks.details: Implement 'Recent' virtual location showing last 20 dashboards opened by current user (LRU order). Create 'Trash' functionality with soft deletion, 30-day retention, and restore capability. Update dashboard access tracking for recent list. Implement permanent deletion after retention period. Add proper UI for both virtual locations.
tasks.testStrategy: Test recent list LRU behavior, trash soft deletion, restore functionality, retention period handling, and permanent deletion. Verify proper tracking of dashboard access for recent list.

tasks.title: Final Integration, Type Safety, and Testing
tasks.description: Complete final integration testing, ensure TypeScript compliance, and verify all requirements are met
tasks.details: Perform comprehensive integration testing across all workspace functionality. Run `pnpm exec tsc --noEmit` to ensure zero TypeScript errors. Verify all functional requirements are implemented correctly. Test cross-browser compatibility, accessibility compliance (WCAG 2.1 AA), and performance requirements. Clean up any remaining issues and ensure proper error handling throughout the application.
tasks.testStrategy: Comprehensive end-to-end testing of all workflows, TypeScript compilation verification, accessibility testing with screen readers, performance testing with large datasets, and cross-browser compatibility verification.

tasks.title: Unify Workspace submenu surface to a single source
tasks.description: Remove duplicate Workspace submenu rendering and keep only one canonical submenu surface in Workspace module context.
tasks.details: Audit Workspace navigation composition (module rail panel, workspace page side panel, and any route-level wrappers) and identify where duplicate submenu UIs are rendered. Keep only one submenu instance mounted at runtime for Workspace views. The canonical visual style must match the left blue module-panel pattern used by other module submenus. Preserve existing menu entries and click behavior: All Dashboards, Shared with me, Recent, Trash.
tasks.testStrategy: Manual verification: in Workspace routes, only one submenu is visible; all four entries remain available and functional; no duplicate white submenu appears.

tasks.title: Preserve Workspace submenu behavior after layout unification
tasks.description: Ensure submenu state, routing, badges, and active styling remain unchanged after removing duplicate rendering.
tasks.details: Refactor the surviving submenu container so it still drives the same navigation destinations and active-state highlighting. Keep counts/badges and interactions intact (e.g., Shared with me and Trash badges, selected destination highlighting). Ensure no changes to underlying filtering/sorting behavior are introduced by the layout change. Wire any displaced actions from removed panel into the canonical panel if needed.
tasks.testStrategy: Route test: clicking each submenu entry lands on expected route/view. State test: active item styling and badges/counts still update correctly. Behavior parity: dashboard lists and filters remain unchanged.

tasks.title: Workspace submenu visual consistency and regression sweep
tasks.description: Align Workspace submenu visuals with module-panel design system and run a focused regression check across Workspace navigation.
tasks.details: Apply final styling checks so Workspace submenu matches blue module-panel look-and-feel used by other module submenus (spacing, contrast, selected state, icon treatment). Validate responsiveness and ensure no duplicated rail section appears in common viewport sizes. Run a smoke pass on Workspace pages (/workspace, /workspace/shared, /workspace/recent, /workspace/trash, folder view) for layout regressions.
tasks.testStrategy: Visual QA at key breakpoints; smoke navigation across all Workspace routes; verify no duplicate submenu container appears and no console/render-loop errors are introduced.
